title: Checkout API Contract Change — /v1 → /v2
author: derek.vasquez
content:
BREAKING CHANGE — 2026-04-25 01:45 UTC

The checkout API endpoint has been migrated to v2 as part of the payment processor upgrade.

Old endpoint: POST /v1/checkout
New endpoint: POST /v2/checkout

Changes in v2:
- Request body now requires `payment_method_token` instead of `card_details`
- Response includes `checkout_session_id` for idempotency
- /v1/checkout is deprecated and will return 410 Gone on 2026-05-01

All integrations must update before Monday 2026-04-28 launch. The launch page integration (NOVA-142) has been filed as a critical blocker. Derek Vasquez is leading the fix. QA smoke test (NOVA-143) is blocked pending integration update.
